sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105237" key="triskopa/nistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρισ-κοπάνιστος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-struck</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">-stamped,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρτος τ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-kneaded,</tr_> i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fine,</tr_> bread, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
